text-muted.$description: Muted meta text. Darkened from #737373 so it clears WCAG AA 4.5:1 on the off-white surfaces it sits on (--uix-bg-subtle #F5F5F5, --uix-bg-app #FAFAFA); the old value was 4.34:1 on #F5F5F5.

accent.$description: Runtime: chains through the write-only --uix-brand slot. Must stay var() to keep live brand override.

accent-hover.$description: Primary-button hover. Theme-aware: derived from the live accent so it tracks the brand override (light darkens, dark lightens — see tokens/dark).

brand-muted.$description: Runtime: color-mix of the live accent.

warning-text.$description: Warning-toned TEXT, legible on the faint --uix-warning-bg in light mode — the bright --uix-warning (#F99C00) fails contrast on pale yellow, so the foreground is a hand-darkened amber. Dark mode overrides to track --uix-warning. Used by status-pill --warning.

info-text.$description: Info-toned TEXT, legible on --uix-info-bg and dark surfaces. Light = --uix-info (already AA on the pale tint); dark brightens it (the deep --uix-info #2563EB fails as text on the dark tint). Used by status-pill/alert/node --info. See --uix-warning-text for the same TEXT-vs-SOLID split.

danger-text.$description: Danger-toned TEXT, legible on --uix-danger-bg (the bright --uix-danger #E40014 is only 4.05:1 on #FFE4E6). A hand-darkened red for text; --uix-danger stays the SOLID role (danger button bg, critical pill, dots). Dark mode brightens it. Used by pill/alert/stat-trend/field-error/menu/sla/node/audit --danger.

success-solid.$description: SOLID status role — the vivid fill/dot/pulse color, distinct from the legible TEXT role (--uix-success). Products override per brand.

scrim.$description: Backdrop behind modal / drawer / side-peek overlays and the avatar edit-overlay — dims the content beneath. Theme-invariant: a black scrim reads on light and dark alike (no dark override).

scrim-strong.$description: Heavier scrim for media-focus surfaces (lightbox), where the backdrop should recede fully behind the image.
